SIECU2 V1.4

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 07
Func Name: HLS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "267",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 36994,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Sensor Signal out of Range"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36995,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Sensor Signal not plausible"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36996,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Supply voltage under limit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36997,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LowBeam Signal open line"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36999,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Actuator OutPut CC ground"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37000,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Actuator OutPut CC Battery"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37002,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU not calibarted"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36993,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU not initialized"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36998,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Vehicule speed over specified limit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 36992,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EEPROM et configuration"
  }
]

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "7E",
    "sentbytes": "3E",
    "name": "Tester present",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "C2",
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "Stop Communication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7BD3",
    "sentbytes": "3BD30055",
    "name": "Write data for initialization",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "C1D08F",
    "sentbytes": "81",
    "name": "Start Communication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 20,
    "replybytes": "6181",
    "sentbytes": "2181",
    "name": "Read Tracability",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "HELLA Part Number": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "HELLA variant": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "HELLA Revision": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "HELLA ECU Serial Number": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "Year of manufacture": {
        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "Month of manufacture": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "Day of manufacture": {
        "firstbyte": 20
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 10,
    "replybytes": "61D1",
    "sentbytes": "21D1",
    "name": "Read Process Values",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Sensor angle": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Actuator output": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Actuator measured": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Vehicle Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Light Signal": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Supply Voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "External 5V": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "External Sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "61D2",
    "sentbytes": "21D2",
    "name": "Read Results of Initialization",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Initialization status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 4,
    "replybytes": "61D30055",
    "sentbytes": "21D3",
    "name": "Read init parameter",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Init Parameter 1": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Init Parameter 2": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "replybytes": "6180",
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CalibrationNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DiagnosticIdentificationCode": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SoftwareNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SupplierNumber.ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "EditionNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PartNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "HardwareNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PartNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "HardwareNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ManufacturerIdentificationCode": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {

    "replybytes": "61D4",
    "sentbytes": "21D4",

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 12
      },

        "firstbyte": 14
      }

    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      }
    }
  },
